name: Lactic Acid
description: A mild AHA exfoliant that also acts as a skin-identical humectant, making it ideal for sensitive or dry skin.
scientificSummary: Larger molecule than glycolic acid, penetrates more slowly for gentler results. Also recognized as a skin-identical NMF component.
mechanismOfAction: Breaks desmosomes between corneocytes while simultaneously hydrating via its role as a natural moisturizing factor.

seo.title: Lactic Acid - Gentle Exfoliating AHA | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover how Lactic Acid exfoliates and hydrates simultaneously for smoother, more radiant skin.
